use_cases: Primary call-to-action on contact and landing pages
Interactive CTA button for hero sections
Newsletter or signup button with premium feel
Portfolio or personal website contact action
ai_summary: A gradient-styled contact CTA button with a distinctive multi-shadow trail effect on hover. Features responsive sizing, dual light/dark mode gradients, and a smooth 3D-lifted animation that creates a shadow cascade effect (#394481, #5766be, #8898f3) when hovered. The button combines minimalist aesthetics with subtle neobrutalist-inspired hover interactions, making it suitable for premium SaaS, fintech, or portfolio contact sections.
